reason: Verified that the SuperAgent application correctly executes browser-use tasks, including opening a browser, navigating to a URL, retrieving the page title, and providing a response that mentions "Example Domain".
steps: Step 1 - Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Success. The application loaded and displayed the home page with available agents.
Step 2 - Found and clicked the "QA-20260707-004222-culk" agent in the sidebar - Success. The agent page loaded, displaying the agent configuration and message input interface.

Step 3 - Typed and sent the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." - Success. The message was entered in the input field and sent using the Send button. A new session was created titled "Browser Navigation and Page Title Query" and the agent status changed from "idle" to "working".

Step 4 - Waited for the agent response - Success. The agent completed processing within 13 seconds (well within the 3-minute timeout). The response included browser tool calls showing the agent opened a browser, navigated to the URL, retrieved the page state, and closed the browser.

Step 5 - Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" - Success. The final response clearly states: "The page at https://example.com has the title "Example Domain". I've closed the browser." The page title "Example Domain" was mentioned twice in the response.
